title: MCG's RPG Campsites
description: Adds Campsites into Minecraft which are occupied by Villagers!
body:
Adds 8 different Campsites into your Minecraft world. 7 of them contain a Villager (Butcher, Farmer, Cartographer, Cleric, Toolsmith, Armorer, and Librarian). The final campsite is abandoned. Each one contains a Chest containing Village loot, and one of the Camps has a Ruined Portal. I plan to add more Camps soon, including some Pillager ones, and extra variants!

They all use vanilla blocks, and the Villagers can be traded with. They're quite rare but can be found using the /locate command if necessary. They primarily spawn in grassy biomes, split between Plains, Taiga, and Savannahs.
